description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.8 Docker image and define variables BUILD_DIR, GO_SRC, REPO_HOST, REPO_NAME, REPO_PATH, REPO_USER as given. Add a before_script that creates the directory $GO_SRC/$REPO_HOST/$REPO_PATH, copies $BUILD_DIR to $GO_SRC/$REPO_HOST/$REPO_USER/, changes to that directory, runs go get github.com/tools/godep/ and restores dependencies with godep restore. Define a build stage with a build-example job that runs 'godep go build'. Define a test stage with a test-example job that runs 'godep go test -v -cover ./...'.
